activities_projects.title: Meaning of Population
steps: Read the introduction section of the chapter
Write the definition of population in your notebook
Mention why population is important for a country
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand the meaning and importance of population

activities_projects.title: India's Population Size Activity
steps: Read the section on India's population size
Write India's population according to Census 2011
Mention India's share in world population
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students learn basic facts about India's population

activities_projects.title: Most Populous States Activity
steps: Locate Uttar Pradesh on the map
Locate Maharashtra and Bihar
Write the names of these states in your notebook
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students identify highly populated states in India

activities_projects.title: Population Density Concept
activities_projects.objective: Understand the concept of population density
steps: Write the definition of population density
Write India's population density in 2011
Give one example of a densely populated state
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand the concept of population density

activities_projects.title: Population Growth Activity
steps: Write the meaning of population growth
Mention one reason for population increase
Write one effect of population growth
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand basic population growth concept

activities_projects.title: Birth Rate and Death Rate
steps: Write the definition of birth rate
Write the definition of death rate
Explain their role in population growth
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand birth and death rates

activities_projects.title: Migration Activity
steps: Write the definition of migration
Mention two reasons why people migrate
Give an example of rural to urban migration
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand migration and its causes

activities_projects.title: Adolescent Population Activity
steps: Write the age group of adolescents
Explain why adolescents are important for the future
Mention one health problem faced by adolescents
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand the importance of adolescent population

activities_projects.title: National Population Policy Activity
steps: Write the name of the population policy introduced in 2000
List two objectives of the policy
Explain its importance briefly

activities_projects.title: Family Size Observation
steps: Ask three classmates about their family size
Write the information in a small table
Find the average family size
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students learn basic population data observation
activities_projects.evaluation: Correct data recording and calculation (10 marks)
